div.p: Twelfth Meeting of the Working Group Participating in the Washington Exploratory Conversations on Security, August 18, 1948

The twelfth meeting was devoted to discussion and suggested revision of draft statements on the “Nature of North American Association with North Atlantic Security Arrangements” and the “Outline of Provisions which Might be Suitable for Inclusion in a North Atlantic Security Arrangement.” The unsigned memorandum of this meeting is not printed (840.20/8–1848).
